summary: Frontend-only mobile-first validation run completed on public Expo preview URL. Onboarding, profile persistence, tabs (including Settings), reminder toggle/time save, add expense, transactions edit/delete, and dashboard daily limit flows passed. Two areas remain: PDF export status behavior on web automation and unstable Expo web preview (Metro disconnect) during retest.

ui_bugs.issue: After tapping Export as PDF on web preview automation, no success/fallback status message was observed within wait window. Likely tied to print dialog lifecycle in web/headless flow, but currently non-deterministic for user feedback verification.

integration_issues.issue: Retest run encountered Metro disconnection ('Disconnected from Metro (1006)'), after which selectors became unavailable and app state reset to onboarding.

action_items: Verify PDF export UX on web: ensure deterministic user feedback appears after print dialog action/cancel.
Re-run month selector multi-month validation in a stable web preview session (seed data with at least 2 month buckets).
Investigate and stabilize Expo web preview/Metro disconnect behavior for reliable QA cycles.
critical_code_review_comments: useExpenseStore.runStateUpdate captures outer `state` while also using setState; rapid async writes can risk stale-state persistence under concurrent actions.
Feature behavior depends on AsyncStorage state; adding deterministic test seed hooks/testIDs for insights metrics would improve verifiability without brittle text parsing.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST expenses via UI (TEST_CURR_MONTH, TEST_EDIT_DELETE, TEST_EDITED). Attempted prior-month seeding for month-selector validation; retest was affected by session instability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Primary flows passed in one stable run. Remaining checks should focus on (1) PDF export status behavior on web and (2) month-selector multi-month validation in stable session. If Metro disconnect reappears, capture supervisor expo logs before rerun.
rca_of_issue: RCA (environment + UX observability): PDF export on web calls Print.printAsync, which may depend on browser print dialog lifecycle not reliably represented in headless automation; status text may not appear deterministically during automated wait windows. Separate issue: Expo preview showed 'Disconnected from Metro (1006)' during retest, causing app rerender/reset and selector failures unrelated to feature logic.
